name: deliberation-room
description: Multi-agent deliberation system for biblical commentary analysis

scripts.dev-model-haiku: bun run dev:css & sleep 3 ; PARTICIPANT_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5 ORCHESTRATOR_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5 bun run dev:server
scripts.dev-model-default: bun run dev:css & sleep 3 ; bun run dev:server
scripts.dev:css: set -x ; pkill -f 'tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/compiled-style.css --watch --poll' ; bun run update-browsers-list ; tail -f /dev/null | bunx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/compiled-style.css --watch --poll
scripts.build:css: bun run update-browsers-list ; bunx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/compiled-style.css --minify
scripts.test:e2e: bun run tests/e2e/landing-page.test.ts && bun run tests/e2e/conversation.test.ts && bun run tests/e2e/integration.test.ts
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && bun run update-browsers-list && bunx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o /dev/null 2>&1
